metadata.description: Utah 2026 provisional general-season elk hunt opportunities dataset built from the official DWR hunt planner boundary table and 2025 DWR remaining permits season labels.
metadata.notes: Unit-by-unit records generated from official DWR hunt-to-boundary joins. Season labels are carried forward from 2025 until updated 2026 field regulations are published. Private-land-only elk was moved to the special elk dataset.
